configurations.name: backend
runtimeArgs: cd backend && if [ -z "$JAVA_HOME" ]; then export JAVA_HOME=$(/usr/libexec/java_home -v 21 2>/dev/null || ls -d $HOME/.jdks/jdk-21*/Contents/Home 2>/dev/null | head -1); fi; export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; exec ./mvnw quarkus:dev

configurations.name: commande
runtimeArgs: cd frontends/commande && exec npm run dev
